svg.title: AXI4-Lite MMIO handshake — PicoRV32 to peripheral accelerator
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing write and read phases of AXI4-Lite communication between the PicoRV32 CPU master and peripheral slaves, including the CPU stall caused by the FSM polling loop
svg.text: High CPI (6.06) = structural hazard: single-port BRAM cannot serve instr fetch + data simultaneously
